description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:8-jdk Docker image, defining variables ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS=27.0.3, ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK=27, ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS=24.4.1. Include a before_script that runs apt-get --quiet update --yes, apt-get --quiet install --yes wget tar unzip lib32stdc++6 lib32z1, downloads the Android SDK with wget --quiet --output-document=android-sdk.tgz https://dl.google.com/android/android-sdk_r${ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS}-linux.tgz, extracts it with tar --extract --gzip --file=android-sdk.tgz, silently updates the SDK using android-sdk-linux/tools/android for android-${ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK}, platform-tools, build-tools-${ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS}, extra-android-m2repository, extra-google-google_play_services, extra-google-m2repository, sets ANDROID_HOME=$PWD/android-sdk-linux, adds $PWD/android-sdk-linux/platform-tools/ to PATH, and chmod +x ./gradlew. Define stages build and test, and add a build job in the build stage that runs ./gradlew assembleDebug and publishes the app/build/outputs/ directory as an artifact. No additional rules, caches, or deployment targets are configured.
